Name: ITEM_USE_CHECK_DIALOG_PARAM
Description: Defines conditional confirmation dialogs shown before an item can be used, including multiple check conditions and corresponding localized display text.

Fields.Name: Check Type 1
Fields.Description: First condition type used to determine whether a confirmation dialog should be displayed before item use.

Fields.Name: Check Type 2
Fields.Description: Second condition type for additional validation before showing the item use confirmation dialog.

Fields.Name: Check Type 3
Fields.Description: Third condition type used in multi-stage or extended item usage validation logic.

Fields.Name: Check Type 4
Fields.Description: Fourth condition type for advanced or special-case item usage checks.

Fields.Name: Display Text ID 1
Fields.Description: Text ID used for the first confirmation or warning message shown when check type 1 is triggered.

Fields.Name: Display Text ID 2
Fields.Description: Text ID used for the second confirmation or warning message associated with check type 2.

Fields.Name: Display Text ID 3
Fields.Description: Text ID used for the third confirmation or warning message associated with check type 3.

Fields.Name: Display Text ID 4
Fields.Description: Text ID used for the fourth confirmation or warning message associated with check type 4.
